kept.text:
$LLY $NVO 
So one case of hepatic failure reported with $LLY Foundayo. To put this in perspective, with the injectables in this class, the reported hepatic incidents have been well under 1 in 100,000. Other oral GLP-1 agonists have also had reported liver tox, which perhaps raises the suspicion level. Could be nothing, but could be something. 
I personally took some profits on LLY and added more to my recently acquired Novo, which I think has the superior oral (although much higher COGS). LLY has the superior injectable and a much better pipeline, but is also much more expensive than NVO.

tweet.text:
One case is meaningless unless confirmed as no other reason to explain for $LLy orforglipron.    But ALT imbalance was a repeated theme in all of $LLy ( higher dose ) , $GPCR and $AZN trials. 

 $PFE  killed danuglipron for a single case ? And CMO stated not even sure 100 % related. ?

If this Lilly report is true then it is showing up at starter dose , which is possible when u give 20000 humans the drug and there in a potential for DDI. 

Again if true it is showing up much sooner than I thought. 

Could make oral peptide Co explode.  
 like $VKTX has now with potentially two offerings with oral amylin peptide entering clinic

$AAPL $NVDA $TSM $LLY

Amerikan Üretiminde 9 Trilyon Dolarlık Yeni Dönem

ABD toprakları devasa bir sermaye akınına sahne oluyor; bir yıldan kısa sürede tam $9 trilyon üretim için sahaya indi. Apple, Nvidia ve Eli Lilly gibi devler, operasyonlarını hızla Amerika'ya taşıyor veya burada genişletiyor.

Bu sadece bir fabrika kurma yarışı değil, küresel tedarik zincirinin merkezini yeniden tanımlayan stratejik bir hamle. Jim Rickards'ın uyardığı gibi, buzdağının altında yatan asıl hikaye çok daha derin. Teknoloji üretiminde kartlar yeniden dağıtılırken, ekonomik bağımsızlık savaşı yeni bir boyuta evriliyor. 🛠️🇺🇸

主力製品であるGotham（政府向け）・Foundry（商業向け）・AIP（AI Platform）を通じて、複雑なデータの統合・分析・意思決定支援を実現しています。
AIインフラ企業として急成長中であり、米国政府・防衛領域および民間企業のデジタル変革を支援しています。
